summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of DevYugSolutions website. All core features working perfectly with professional light theme, correct branding, and full mobile responsiveness.

minor_issues.issue: Page title shows 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of DevYugSolutions branding
Dark background class bg-[#050505] present but not affecting display
minor_issues.note: Individual components have proper light backgrounds

passed_tests: Hero section loads with professional light theme (#0A346C, #3A5A85, #F6F6F6)
Header shows DevYugSolutions logo and navigation (About, Services, Portfolio, FAQ, Blog)
Get Free Quote button scrolls to contact section (header and hero buttons)
Services section displays 6 service cards (Business, Portfolio, Landing, E-commerce, Redesign, Speed)
Portfolio section shows 6 projects with working external links
FAQ accordion works correctly (8 items with proper open/close)
Testimonials show client initials AS, RG, VS (no stock photos) with navigation
Contact form shows hello@devyugsolutions.com email with mailto functionality
Footer shows DevYugSolutions branding with functional buttons
Mobile responsive design with working hamburger menu
All WhatsApp integrations working with correct phone number
Contact form submission opens mailto with form data
Professional color scheme and typography throughout
action_item_for_main_agent: Update page title from 'Emergent | Fullstack App' to 'DevYug Solutions - Professional Web Development' and optionally remove unused dark background class from App.js
